creator: andreast@fgznet.ch
text:
Add swissgerman support for the MacBook/Powerbook keyboard mapping.
The attached kbd file tries to implement this mapping.

The mapping tries to follow the same layout as OS-X does, e.g: the @ on alt-G, the # on alt-3 etc.
It might be that the mapping is not 100% complete, but for work on the console it is enough. All the important keys are mapped: ('#@[]|{}<>~').

I use this map since FreeBSD release 6.x on my Powerbook and now also on my MacBook Pro.

Hopefully it is worth to enter the source tree.

Thanks in advance.

Andreas

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
